title: Kitenge Wrap Dress
desc: Hand-finished Kitenge wrap dress in bold Ankara print. Lightweight cotton, made in Kigali. Adjustable waist tie.

title: Wireless Earbuds Pro
desc: True-wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation, 28h battery with case, USB-C fast charge. 1-year local warranty.

title: Woven Sisal Basket
desc: Traditional Agaseke-inspired sisal basket, hand-woven in Musanze. Perfect for storage or as a statement piece.

title: Shea Glow Serum
desc: Brightening face serum with East-African shea and vitamin C. Lightweight, fragrance-free, 30ml.

title: Leather Crossbody Bag
desc: Full-grain leather crossbody with adjustable strap and brass hardware. Ages beautifully.

title: Smartphone A54 128GB
desc: 6.4-inch AMOLED, 50MP triple camera, 5000mAh battery, dual SIM. Includes screen protector and case.

title: Ankara Bomber Jacket
desc: Statement bomber with quilted lining and Ankara panel sleeves. Unisex fit.

title: Bluetooth Speaker Mini
desc: Pocket-size speaker, IPX6 waterproof, 12h playtime, deep bass. Pairs in stereo.

title: Ceramic Coffee Set
desc: Four-piece stoneware coffee set, reactive glaze. Microwave and dishwasher safe.

title: Matte Lip Set (5)
desc: Five long-wear matte liquid lipsticks in warm everyday shades. Cruelty-free.

title: Beaded Statement Necklace
desc: Hand-beaded brass and glass necklace. Adjustable length, lightweight.

title: Smart Watch Active
desc: AMOLED fitness watch, heart-rate and SpO2, 100+ sport modes, 10-day battery. Calls via Bluetooth.

title: Cotton Tunic Shirt
desc: Breathable cotton tunic with embroidered neckline. Everyday comfort.

title: Woven Floor Mat
desc: Durable hand-woven floor mat, natural fibre, reversible pattern. 120x80cm.

title: Hydrating Face Mist
desc: Rosewater and aloe facial mist. Sets makeup and refreshes skin. 100ml.

title: Power Bank 20000mAh
desc: Fast-charge power bank, dual USB-C PD, charges a phone 4x. Slim aluminium body.
